Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT AURORA RENOUS IS GRANTED IN PART. The funds are exempted except for $100 per pay period. Order signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ru
